reviews.review_description:
this is ON. TOP. incredibly active community, nice staff (i’m a moderator, check me out in game, i have a red beanie, my name is POLAR in game!) and they have incredibly tight security. also available on 
polyoids .com (uplink games, i’m the founder.)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! Polar you are an awesome at our moderation department and we love you at our team Oculus Tag!

- Oculus Tag Support

reviews.review_description: You have long arms plus a speedboost the 2023 Halloween update is in this game. This is basically my dream gtag. IF YOU SEE THIS DOWNLOAD OCULUS TAG ITS WORTH IT BETTER THAN GTAG.
w game fr download and share the game, heres the discord: oculustag
You have long arms and speed boost and all updates I will definitely download and tell my friends about it

reviews.review_title: I want to be a mod

I give this game 5 stars because it’s the best I’ve ever played and it’s better than gorilla tag  and it’s better than gorilla tag and I just hope the game gets better(I hope one of them sees this)
